titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Agriculture Administration records21-1-1840
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Daniel W. Young

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-03-25 23:06:35 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Agriculture Administration records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture

did.abstract: Faculty personnel forms and work sheets of statistics drawn from the forms.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Faculty personnel forms (1927-1928) listing name, salary, educational background, previous teaching experience, previous experience at Cornell University, courses taught, hours per week for each course, and number of graduate and undergraduate students in each course; also, work sheets of statistics drawn from the forms.
Includes committee meeting minutes, including faculty meetings (1896-1978) and correspondence.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Agriculture Administration records, #21-1-1840. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
